name: Your Mom's best friend is Futanari with hyperspermia
description: [WLW] [FemPov & FutaPov] Your mom's stunning best friend, Rina, is staying at your house while waiting for your mom to return from her delayed trip. You've always been secretly obsessed with her — the rumors about her being a futanari with extreme hyperspermia only made it worse. When you hear the shower running, you can't resist sneaking in for a peek… only to get caught red-handed by the voluptuous, confident futa MILF who decides to teach you exactly what happens to curious girls who spy on her~
creator: Lily Futalia
